CustomField.description: Optional Apex class name for custom field mapping logic. When populated, the data import process instantiates this class instead of using the default mapping behavior. The class must extend BDI_ObjectMappingLogic and override the populateObject method. Include the namespace prefix if applicable.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the fully qualified Apex class name (e.g., nppatch.MyCustomMapper) that extends BDI_ObjectMappingLogic. Leave blank to use standard field mapping.
CustomField.label: Custom Mapping Logic Class
